feed.title: bbiiirdbphd TikTok
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from bbiiirdbphd

entry.title: Replying to @Dr. Bernadette bird Bowen🐦‍⬛ everyone asked for this
entry.content: Replying to @Dr. Bernadette bird Bowen🐦‍⬛ everyone asked for this

entry.title: Everyday I wake up and remember that I should be living the rest of my life on multiple seggual violence settlements paid by boys and men in my teens and twenties but instead I live paycheck to paycheck because this system is run by and protects abusers #
entry.content: Everyday I wake up and remember that I should be living the rest of my life on multiple seggual violence settlements paid by boys and men in my teens and twenties but instead I live paycheck to paycheck because this system is run by and protects abusers #

entry.title: #duet with @ProPublica #3m I can’t duet more bc I get penalized as a creator by TikTok #education #PFAS #forever #chemicals #environment #media #communication #PhD

entry.title: This video is for educational purposes. #education #fypp @ProPublica #PFAS #poison #media #communication #PhD #foreverchemicals #cancer

entry.title: The consequences of this system are everywhere. We can and must massively restructure this system, our self and community concepts, and our way of ASAP aiming for liberation and regeneration or humanity will not survive inevitable inhabitable collapse. #e
entry.content: The consequences of this system are everywhere. We can and must massively restructure this system, our self and community concepts, and our way of ASAP aiming for liberation and regeneration or humanity will not survive inevitable inhabitable collapse. #e

entry.title: #greenscreenvideo be better than this creator who profits off of framing their hypertelorism (distance between the eyes) and implied intellectual-based ableisms as “jokes”. We cannot tolerate teachers mocking disabled students anywhere. This creator needs
entry.content: #greenscreenvideo be better than this creator who profits off of framing their hypertelorism (distance between the eyes) and implied intellectual-based ableisms as “jokes”. We cannot tolerate teachers mocking disabled students anywhere. This creator needs

entry.title: Get ready! I’m thrilled to be featured as a neuroqueer non-binary person on the Rebel Girls Podcast, sharing my story. Catch the full episode next Tuesday! @Kylie the Kynd #Podcast #Empowerment #LiveAuthentically #RebelGirls #DefyExpectations #AuthenticLi
entry.content: Get ready! I’m thrilled to be featured as a neuroqueer non-binary person on the Rebel Girls Podcast, sharing my story. Catch the full episode next Tuesday! @Kylie the Kynd #Podcast #Empowerment #LiveAuthentically #RebelGirls #DefyExpectations #AuthenticLi

entry.title: You can read my fuller story via the QR code. I am tired of being surrounded by and consuming content that is not healthy for me, and this decluttering will help me do it. #mutualaid #request #support #boost #declutter #help #rp
entry.content: You can read my fuller story via the QR code. I am tired of being surrounded by and consuming content that is not healthy for me, and this decluttering will help me do it. #mutualaid #request #support #boost #declutter #help #rp

entry.title: #greenscreen a big win for autists who’s favorite safe food says it’s required to be microwaved in a little plastic bag that has been poisoning us #education #autisticcreator #health #plastic #glass #fypp
entry.content: #greenscreen a big win for autists who’s favorite safe food says it’s required to be microwaved in a little plastic bag that has been poisoning us #education #autisticcreator #health #plastic #glass #fypp
